generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.com/DTDFVocab#
prefix base: http://www.ontotext.com/oml#base
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "measures the oscillation angle of the hoist during movement for dynamic system monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "monitors wind speed to assess environmental impacts on crane stability",
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance CartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "controls cart movement of the gantry crane"
]

instance HoistingMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "controls hoisting movement of the gantry crane"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "used at the hoist end for container pickup"
]

instance PathPlanningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "optimal path planning for crane operations"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "scenario analysis for construction environments"
]

instance PredictiveModelingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "predictive modeling to inform virus spread prevention strategies in construction environments"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "historical data analysis for operational trends"
]

instance RuntimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "visualizes real-time crane behavior for operational monitoring"
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "continuous validation of digital twin against physical system"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "detection of faults for timely maintenance"
]

instance OptimalControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "adjusts crane parameters for optimal operation",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "computes optimal paths using the kinematic model for crane motion",
    DTDFVocab:provides PathPlanningInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "dynamically models crane behavior for real-time analysis and planning",
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight, PredictiveModelingInsight
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "provides optimal control for the physical crane",
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "logs operational data for historical analysis",
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "visualizes real-time crane behavior for operational monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:provides RuntimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "validates digital twin against physical system behavior continuously",
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "detects faults in the crane system for proactive maintenance",
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance AutodeskFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion360 for CAD modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService
]

instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Capella for system architecture design",
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB for time-series data storage",
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboards for real-time data visualization",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for real-time communication between services",
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance GantryLib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ganttylib Python module for modular software structure using C4 Containers",
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "real-time oscillation angle measurements from Swing Angle Encoder",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, Grafana
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "real-time wind speed measurements from Anemometer",
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, Grafana
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "geometric representation of the physical crane using CAD",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AutodeskFusion360
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "kinematic model for motion simulation of the crane",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Capella
]

instance ConstructionEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "industrial automation environment for lab-scale gantry crane",
    base:contains CartMotor, HoistingMotor, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Trajectory Generator Service generates movement trajectories that are executed by the Control Application via the Physical Crane Interface to control the physical crane hardware."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system employs continuous synchronization via a Python Logging Application that records the gantry crane's state in real-time to a database and a Continuous Validation Service that compares sensor measurements to ensure data integrity and temporal consistency."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture is visualized using the C4 Model with context and container diagrams, employing containerization and virtualization technologies for deployment in an ad-hoc approach without a commercial digital twin framework."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "A Continuous Validation Service compares real-time measurements of executed trajectories with simulation outputs using distance metrics against an acceptable threshold."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Services communicate via MQTT protocol using an MQTT Broker. The Physical Crane Interface connects to the crane controllers using a Python program. No specific network topology, bandwidth, or latency details are provided in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The entire system is deployed on a single on-premise personal computer, with TimescaleDB (database), Eclipse Mosquitto (MQTT broker), and Grafana (dashboard) containerized using Docker. All services run within the same host environment, leveraging Docker for isolation and resource management. No cloud or edge deployment is used, and scalability is constrained by the host machine's resources."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The system integrates with external components using MQTT protocol via Eclipse Mosquitto as the message broker for real-time data exchange between physical sensors and digital components."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Lab Scale Gantry Crane employs the C4 Model for software architecture visualization, adhering to its standardized context and container diagram specifications, but adopts an ad-hoc approach without compliance to specific digital twin industry standards."
]
